tender.description: Engagement of Security Guard, Supervisor, Armed Security Guard / Gunman, cleaner/sweeper, Gardener, Plumber and Plumbing Helper to the Integrated Science and Technology Campus of the University of Calcutta at Rajarhat for a period of 03 years.
